top_signals.title: More US troop withdrawals from Europe expected, NATO commander says
top_signals.summary: Gen. Alexus Grynkewich said Europe should "absolutely" expect additional U.S. troop withdrawals as NATO allies provide more of their own defense.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin rebounds above $77,000. Analysts weigh in on whether the bounce has legs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Vance defends stock trading spree in Trump financial filings: 'Come on, man'
top_signals.summary: Vice President JD Vance said at the White House on Tuesday that he and President Donald Trump both support banning congressional stock trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
